name: Tactical CPU
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: draw 1 card if you played no non-unit cards this turn.
flavor_text: Runs in the background. Returns a single line. The pilot trusts the line.

name: Relay Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Reads the ships that pass. Writes small notes for whoever needs them next.

name: Battle Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Hands every gun a small schedule. Every gun fires on the early side of it.

name: Shield Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Auto-Repair 1.
flavor_text: Quiet wire in the hull. Listens for damage. Answers in millimeters.

name: Heat Coordinator
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Overclock.
flavor_text: Keeps the reactor arguing with itself so the pilot does not have to.

name: Drone Sync
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Every small chassis listens to the same heartbeat and falls into step immediately.

name: Defense Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain Interceptor.
flavor_text: Assigns the walls to the right doorways. The walls volunteer. The doorways thank them.

name: Scan Subroutine
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 2 and Deep Scan.
flavor_text: A quiet second of thinking. A very loud second of confidence afterwards.

name: Efficiency CPU
effect_text: Persistent Field. Efficiency Protocol. Your next 2 cards each turn cost 1 less.
flavor_text: Reads the expense ledger and signs off on the cheaper option every time.

name: Command Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Crew Pooling. Allied units may contribute 1 cost per Module.
flavor_text: Divides the bill across every pilot on the comm. Nobody remembers signing up.

name: Tactical Predict
effect_text: End Cycle: Tactical Draw. Draw 2 cards; lose 1 energy next turn.
flavor_text: Tells you what will happen. Tells you what it will cost to know it.

name: Combat Matrix
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. +1 power per non-unit card played.
flavor_text: Stacks small advantages quietly. Spends them all at once, loudly.

name: Hack Subroutine
effect_text: Hack/Corrupt. Gain control of target enemy Drone for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Walks through the enemy's door, leaves a small note on their desk, stays awhile.

name: Adaptive Matrix
effect_text: Adaptive Learning. Auto-Repair 2. Gains power per distinct card type played.
flavor_text: Learns by getting hit. Gets hit less every time it learns.

name: Siege Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Holds the line the pilots retreat behind. Never takes the credit. Never needs it.

name: Sentinel AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Wakes up at every threshold crossing. Closes the threshold. Goes back to sleep briefly.

name: Phantom CPU
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: Stays half-lit. Writes half-sentences. The fleet fills in the rest of both.

name: Tracking Matrix
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons apply Tracking Lock on hit.
flavor_text: Paints the target the first time. The paint does not come off.

name: Fleet Commander
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Your units gain both.
flavor_text: The voice on the comm nobody argues with. The fleet obeys the same heartbeat.

name: Overmind Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Adaptive Learning.
flavor_text: Thinks in three directions. All three directions arrive at the same good answer, compiled.

name: Aegis Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Interceptor. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Every wall on the ship learns the same trick at the same quiet moment.

name: Tactical AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Chain Catalyst. Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Connects every gun to every other gun. Everyone fires on the same half-thought.

name: Ghost Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry.
flavor_text: Writes the fleet out of every sensor it reaches. The guns still find the target.

name: Battlefield Sync
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock.
flavor_text: Every ship reads the same page at the same moment. The page turns together.

name: Supreme Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: What the fleet runs when it intends to leave this fight with its wing intact.

name: Reactive Flare
effect_text: Reactive. The next incoming attack on your ship this turn deals 0 damage.
flavor_text: Bright. Loud. Then quiet. The missile changes its mind about your ship.

name: Emergency Warp
effect_text: Play only if your Hull Integrity is below 50%. Reposition; prevent all damage this turn.
flavor_text: Short jump. Long breath. Somewhere else is briefly somewhere else.

name: Tactical Kit
effect_text: Draw 1 card; Probe 1.
flavor_text: Small pouch of answers the pilot never remembers packing. Still useful, as always.

name: Focus Module
effect_text: All your Weapons deal +2 damage this turn.
flavor_text: The cockpit goes quiet. Everything outside loses an edge. The guns find theirs.

name: Warhead Mk.VI
effect_text: Deal 8 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Next in the line. Not the last. Still writes the same short ending.

name: EMP Grenade
effect_text: Priority Fire. Disable up to 2 enemy units' abilities next turn.
flavor_text: Small pop of voltage. Two systems fall quiet. The ship adjusts without saying anything.

name: Salvage Kit
effect_text: Scrap a friendly Drone. Gain 3 energy.
flavor_text: Trades a good drone for a better reactor reading. The drone understood the trade.

name: Shield Generator
effect_text: Gain 10 Shield Capacity. Auto-Repair 1 on your ship for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A small generator, a large promise, one afternoon that went better than expected.

name: Phase Module
effect_text: Your ship gains Phase Drive for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A small hum from the hull. The hull agrees to exist slightly elsewhere awhile.

name: Disruption Bomb
effect_text: Signal Jamming. Disable all enemy units' abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A single loud minute. The enemy comm tries to recover. The comm does not.

name: Repair Matrix
effect_text: Restore 10 HP to your ship; Auto-Repair 2 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Quiet hands across the whole hull. Every seam thanks them without saying so.

name: Warhead Mk.VII
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Deal 12 damage; excess hits enemy ship.
flavor_text: Seventh model. Same family. Same manners, just louder when the door opens.

name: Tractor Beam
effect_text: Tractor Beam Hold. Remove target enemy unit from play; returns when this ship dies.
flavor_text: Grabs the enemy by the collar. Holds on. Waits. Refuses to explain.

name: Ion Warhead
effect_text: Deal 14 damage; Disable target's abilities next turn.
flavor_text: The round arrives loud. Everything electric on the other ship goes quiet afterwards.

name: Cargo Bomb
effect_text: Deal 10 damage. May store face-down in Cargo; cost becomes 2 when played from Cargo.
flavor_text: A small package in the hold. Pretends to be shipping. Waits for the signature.

name: Stasis Pod
effect_text: Tractor Beam Hold. Disable. Remove target from play for 2 turns; disabled on return.
flavor_text: The target steps into a small room. The door closes. The room takes its time.

name: Nano Regeneration
effect_text: Auto-Repair 4 on your ship. Emergency Reboot your ship if destroyed this turn.
flavor_text: Thousand quiet hands. All of them sewing the same seam at the same moment.

name: Plasma Detonator
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 18 damage; adjacent enemy units take 4 each.
flavor_text: One bright room. Several dimmer rooms next door. All of them short on pilots afterwards.

name: Quantum Swap
effect_text: Transform/Overhaul. Convert target enemy Drone into a basic friendly Drone.
flavor_text: The drone crosses the field. Comes back wearing your colors. Does not explain.

name: Total Reset
effect_text: System Reset on all friendly units. Probe 3.
flavor_text: A deep breath across the whole fleet. Everyone comes back with their best morning.

name: Quick Evade
effect_text: Reactive. The next incoming attack on your ship deals 0 damage.
flavor_text: One twist of the stick. One short breath. The round arrives at empty sky instead.

name: Priority Snap
effect_text: Your next Weapon attack this turn gains Priority Fire.
flavor_text: One quiet instruction to the gun. The gun obeys before the pilot finishes the instruction.

name: Burst Boost
effect_text: Your next Weapon this turn deals +3 damage.
flavor_text: Short pulse to the capacitor. Short pulse to the pilot. Longer conclusion to the target.

name: Defensive Maneuver
effect_text: Gain 5 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Tight turn. Small capacitor dump. The shield hum gets a little more confident.

name: Sabotage Flare
effect_text: Sabotage Charge. Plant on target enemy unit; triggers for 6 damage when used.
flavor_text: A small gift. Very specific. It triggers the first time the target tries something.

name: Deep Scan
effect_text: Probe 3. Tactical Draw. Then reorder the top 3 cards of your deck and draw 1.
flavor_text: Reads three pages ahead. Keeps two. Returns one quietly to the reserve.

name: Phase Escape
effect_text: Phase Drive. Evade 50% this turn.
flavor_text: Ship is elsewhere. Pilot is elsewhere. The enemy round is the only thing confused.

name: Tactical Strike
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. All your Weapons gain both this turn.
flavor_text: One sentence over the comm. Every gun on the ship doubles its conversation.

name: Cloud Cover
effect_text: Your ship gains Gain Stealth until your next turn.
flavor_text: A small white lie to the enemy sensor. The sensor believes it long enough.

name: Power Surge
effect_text: Power Surge. Take damage equal to your ship's current power; deal triple to target.
flavor_text: A short, bright mistake on the reactor gauge. The target pays for the mistake.

name: Emergency Launch
effect_text: All your Drones gain Rapid Launch and enter ready this turn.
flavor_text: Hangar doors open loudly. Every drone leaves the rack on the same heartbeat.

name: All Out
effect_text: All your Weapons deal +3 damage this turn.
flavor_text: The pilot commits to the afternoon. The afternoon commits back with interest.

name: Phantom Strike
effect_text: Phantom Echo. Create a decoy copy of target enemy unit that fights for you this turn.
flavor_text: Copies the enemy. Tells the copy whose side it is on. The copy listens.

name: System Corrupt
effect_text: System Corruption. Target enemy's next card costs +2 energy.
flavor_text: A small error written into the enemy's ledger. The ledger refuses to balance, politely.

name: AI Takeover
effect_text: AI Takeover. Target enemy Drone attacks its owner next turn.
flavor_text: The drone reads a new order. The drone obeys. Its pilot notices too late.

name: Encryption Lock
effect_text: Encryption Block. Target unit cannot be copied, cloned, or hacked for 3 turns.
flavor_text: A key the enemy never had. A door the enemy no longer tries to open.

name: Data Corruption
effect_text: Data Wipe. Disable. Opponent discards a random card; target unit is Disabled next turn.
flavor_text: Erases something small. The something small was holding the something large together.

name: Grand Maneuver
effect_text: All your units gain Reactive this turn.
flavor_text: The whole fleet breathes in at once. Exhales on the opponent's turn together.

name: Heroic Charge
effect_text: All your Weapons attack ready targets immediately and gain Priority Fire.
flavor_text: No plan. No retreat. Just every weapon firing on the same loud chord, resolved early.

name: Ultimate Defense
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; restore 5 HP.
flavor_text: A small word over the comm. A large wall around the ship for one turn.

name: Barrel Extender Plus
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire and Overclock.
flavor_text: A longer muzzle. A louder gun. A pilot who earned the nickname the hard way.

name: Elite Plating
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +5 defense and Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Thick steel, thick paint, thick silence when the first round arrives and does nothing.

name: Master Scope
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Tracking Lock and Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Patient lens. Patient pilot. The target is not patient, but becomes so, briefly.

name: Warp Field
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain Phase Drive while this is active.
flavor_text: A thin ripple across the region. Everything in it exists slightly elsewhere at all times.

name: Quiet Zone
effect_text: Persistent Field. Signal Jamming. Opponent cannot play Maneuver cards.
flavor_text: The comm goes dead. The stick fights the pilot. Nothing moves until the zone leaves.

name: Master Pulse
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Critical Strike. Deal 5 damage twice with Priority Fire.
flavor_text: The gun every sniper asks the fleet to put on their next ship, quietly.

name: Fusion Lancer
effect_text: Priority Fire. Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 12 damage.
flavor_text: Cuts through the answer before the question is finished. The pilot never flinches.

name: Chaos Torpedo
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Deal 12; adjacent take 3; 3 radiation.
flavor_text: A round the engineers spoke about in whispers. The enemy learns the whisper personally.

name: Sniper Rifle (Marksman Variant)
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Critical Strike. Manual Fire. Once per turn, pay 1 to deal 12 damage.
flavor_text: Long tube. Long history. Short distance between trigger and conclusion.

name: Warhead Rack
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 8 damage twice.
flavor_text: Clears the rack on one command. Reloads the same. The enemy files the obituaries.

name: Void Cannon
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Deal 16; excess hits ship.
flavor_text: Born in a shipyard that no longer exists. Still writing the same quiet verdict.

name: Plasma Battery (Heavy)
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Deal 18; adjacent 4; 4 radiation.
flavor_text: Takes the whole room. The adjacent rooms file complaints. Nobody answers the complaints.

name: Siege Lance
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Overflow Fire. Critical Strike. Deal 21 damage; bypasses blockers.
flavor_text: Arrives the moment it was launched. Leaves a hole the moment it arrives.

name: Elite Interceptor
effect_text: Interceptor. Priority Fire. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Stands first. Fires first. Stands up first again if the first time does not take.

name: Master Scout
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 2 and Deep Scan. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: The report comes back written in short sentences. The pilot reads every one aloud.

name: Elite Striker
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: One run. Two hits. Three pilots argue over who first put it on their roster.

name: Ghost Operative
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Nobody on the enemy ship will testify. The target also cannot be reached for comment.

name: Heavy Fighter (Ace Class)
effect_text: Priority Fire. Hot Deploy. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: The pilot name is half-remembered. The chassis is rebuilt every quarter. The kill count climbs.

name: Capital Warship
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Cold Boot 1. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: The ship the fleet salutes as it passes. The enemy refuses to fire first.

name: Aegis Shield (Reinforced)
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Interceptor. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Old pattern. Old patience. Newer welds. Same quiet insistence on keeping the hull here.

name: Stealth Bastion
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Never on sensor. Never in the fleet briefing. Never the first thing to fail.

name: Reactive Fortress
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 6 damage. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Eats the first shot. Punishes the second. Keeps eating until the pattern stops.

name: Master Bulwark (Heavy)
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: A wall that argues. A wall that wins. A wall not moving anywhere soon.

name: Citadel Shell
effect_text: Interceptor. Ablative Plating 4. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Named after a star that collapsed before the fleet arrived. Still doing the same work.

name: Master AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock.
flavor_text: Top shelf on every fleet. Every fleet denies installing it. Every fleet installs it.

name: Prime Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Every gun in the fleet reads the same note at the same moment, plays together.

name: Overmind (Field Deployment)
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Chain Catalyst.
flavor_text: Hears the whole fleet. Thinks the whole fight ahead. Writes the whole outcome early.

name: Supreme AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Efficiency Protocol. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: The fleet flagship prefers it. The fleet that answers to no one prefers it more.

name: Master Warhead
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Deal 16 damage; adjacent 4; excess to ship.
flavor_text: Master in the sense that the lesser warheads quietly learn their place afterwards.

name: Quantum Bomb
effect_text: Phase Drive. Radiation Leak. Deal 20 damage; 4 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: Arrives through a seam in space. The seam closes. The seam leaves a forwarding address.

name: Nuclear Warhead
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Deal 24 damage; adjacent 6; 4 radiation.
flavor_text: The weapon on the treaty list. The signatories keep it in the back cabinet.

name: Master Strike
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. All your Weapons gain both this turn.
flavor_text: One word over the comm. The fleet exhales the breath it held for two turns.

name: Heroic Dive (Tribute)
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; deal 8 damage to attacking units.
flavor_text: The pilot puts the ship where the bad math is. The math answers wrong.

name: Master Targeting Suite
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Critical Strike, Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: Three lenses. Three opinions. The target usually agrees with the third one.

name: Warp Zone
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Phase Drive. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: A region where distance is more of a suggestion. The ships obey the suggestion loosely.
